verses.text: Israel's sons — seventy souls — came into Egypt with Jacob. The family in Egypt. The covenant household settles where God sent Joseph before them.
Israel's sons — seventy souls — came into Egypt with Jacob. The family in Egypt. The covenant household settles where God sent Joseph before them.
Israel's sons — seventy souls — came into Egypt with Jacob. The family in Egypt. The covenant household settles where God sent Joseph before them.
Israel's sons — seventy souls — came into Egypt with Jacob. The family in Egypt. The covenant household settles where God sent Joseph before them.
Israel's sons — seventy souls — came into Egypt with Jacob. The family in Egypt. The covenant household settles where God sent Joseph before them.
Joseph died, but Israel 'increased abundantly... and the land was filled with them.' Fruitful. God's promise to Abraham flourishes after the patriarch is gone.
Joseph died, but Israel 'increased abundantly... and the land was filled with them.' Fruitful. God's promise to Abraham flourishes after the patriarch is gone.
A new king 'which knew not Joseph' feared their numbers and plotted to deal wisely with them. Forgotten kindness. Fear breeds cruelty in the godless.
A new king 'which knew not Joseph' feared their numbers and plotted to deal wisely with them. Forgotten kindness. Fear breeds cruelty in the godless.
A new king 'which knew not Joseph' feared their numbers and plotted to deal wisely with them. Forgotten kindness. Fear breeds cruelty in the godless.
Taskmasters made their lives bitter with hard bondage, 'but the more they afflicted them, the more they multiplied.' Oppressed yet growing. God's blessing outpaced Egypt's malice.

Taskmasters made their lives bitter with hard bondage, 'but the more they afflicted them, the more they multiplied.' Oppressed yet growing. God's blessing outpaced Egypt's malice.
Pharaoh bids the midwives kill the boys, but 'the midwives feared God,' and saved them alive. Holy fear. Reverence for God outweighed the king's command.
Pharaoh bids the midwives kill the boys, but 'the midwives feared God,' and saved them alive. Holy fear. Reverence for God outweighed the king's command.
Pharaoh bids the midwives kill the boys, but 'the midwives feared God,' and saved them alive. Holy fear. Reverence for God outweighed the king's command.
Questioned, they answered wisely; God dealt well with them and 'made them houses.' Rewarded. God honours those who fear Him above men.

Questioned, they answered wisely; God dealt well with them and 'made them houses.' Rewarded. God honours those who fear Him above men.
Pharaoh charges all his people to cast the sons into the river. Cruel decree. Tyranny turns at last to open murder.
